questions.question: A UK phone number has how many digits (not counting the area code)?
Which is the correct way to say 07700 900 123?
options: Oh seven seven hundred nine hundred one two three
Zero seven seven zero zero nine zero zero one two three
Seven seven nine one two three
questions.answer: Zero seven seven zero zero nine zero zero one two three
